> 
> > 
> > >Number:         8157

> > >Synopsis:       new port - upsmon 2.1.3
> 
> > >Description:
> > Basic UPS monitor for the APC SmartUPS devices.
>

> /usr/ports/sysutils/upsd?

Yes. But upsmon is simple.
